options.name: --file
options.description:
Generate config file docfx.json only, no project folder
will be generated

options.name: --output
options.description:
Specify the output folder of the config file. If not
specified, the config file will be saved to a new folder
docfx_project

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
Specify if the current file will be overwritten if it
exists

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Quietly generate the default docfx.json

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Run in debug mode. With debug mode, raw model and view
model will be exported automatically when it encounters error when applying
templates. If not specified, it is false.

options.name: --debugOutput
options.description:
The output folder for files generated for debugging purpose
when in debug mode. If not specified, it is ${TempPath}/docfx

options.name: --disableGitFeatures
options.description:
Disable fetching Git related information for articles. By
default it is enabled and may have side effect on performance when the repo is
large.

options.name: --dryRun
options.description:
If set to true, template will not be actually applied to
the documents. This option is always used with --exportRawModel or
--exportViewModel is set so that only raw model files or view model files are
generated.

options.name: --exportRawModel
options.description:
If set to true, data model to run template script will be
extracted in .raw.model.json extension

options.name: --exportViewModel
options.description:
If set to true, data model to apply template will be
extracted in .view.model.json extension

options.name: --hostname
options.description:
Specify the hostname of the hosted website (e.g.,
'localhost' or '*')

options.name: --keepFileLink
options.description:
If set to true, docfx does not dereference (aka. copy) file
to the output folder, instead, it saves a link_to_path property inside
mainfiest.json to indicate the physical location of that file.

options.name: --log
options.description: Specify the file name to save processing log

options.name: --logLevel
options.description:
Specify to which log level will be logged. By default log
level >= Info will be logged. The acceptable value could be Verbose, Info,
Warning, Error.

options.name: --markdownEngineProperties
options.description:
Set the parameters for markdown engine, value should be a
JSON string.

options.name: --maxParallelism
options.description: Set the max parallelism, 0 is auto.

options.name: --output
options.description: Specify the output base directory

options.name: --port
options.description: Specify the port of the hosted website

options.name: --postProcessors
options.description: Set the order of post processors in plugins

options.name: --rawModelOutputFolder
options.description:
Specify the output folder for the raw model. If not set,
the raw model will be generated to the same folder as the output
documentation

options.name: --repositoryRoot
options.description: Specify the GIT repository root folder.

options.name: --serve
options.description: Host the generated documentation to a website

options.name: --template
options.description:
Specify the template name to apply to. If not specified,
output YAML file will not be transformed.

options.name: --theme
options.description:
Specify which theme to use. By default 'default' theme is
offered.

options.name: --viewModelOutputFolder
options.description:
Specify the output folder for the view model. If not set,
the view model will be generated to the same folder as the output
documentation

options.name: --warningsAsErrors
options.description:
Specify if warnings should be treated as
errors.

options.name: --xref
options.description:
Specify the urls of xrefmap used by content
files.

options.name: --disableDefaultFilter
options.description:
Disable the default API filter (default filter only
generate public or protected APIs).

options.name: --disableGitFeatures
options.description:
Disable fetching Git related information for articles. By
default it is enabled and may have side effect on performance when the repo is
large.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Specify the filter config file

options.name: --globalNamespaceId
options.description:
Specify the name to use for the global
namespace

options.name: --log
options.description: Specify the file name to save processing log

options.name: --logLevel
options.description:
Specify to which log level will be logged. By default log
level >= Info will be logged. The acceptable value could be Verbose, Info,
Warning, Error.

options.name: --namespaceLayout
options.description:
Determines the namespace layout in table of
contents.

options.name: --output
options.description: Specify the output base directory

options.name: --property
options.description:
--property <n1>=<v1>;<n2>=<v2> An
optional set of MSBuild properties used when interpreting project files. These
are the same properties that are passed to msbuild via the
/property:<n1>=<v1>;<n2>=<v2> command line
argument

options.name: --repositoryRoot
options.description: Specify the GIT repository root folder.

options.name: --shouldSkipMarkup
options.description: Skip to markup the triple slash comments

options.name: --warningsAsErrors
options.description:
Specify if warnings should be treated as
errors.

options.name: --hostname
options.description:
Specify the hostname of the hosted website
[localhost]

options.name: --port
options.description: Specify the port of the hosted website [8080]

arguments.name: directory
arguments.description: Path to the directory to serve

options.name: --basePath
options.description:
Specify the base path to generate external link,
{host}/{locale}/{basePath}

options.name: --css
options.description:
Specify the path for the css to generate pdf, default value
is styles/default.css

options.name: --debug
options.description:
Run in debug mode. With debug mode, raw model and view
model will be exported automatically when it encounters error when applying
templates. If not specified, it is false.

options.name: --debugOutput
options.description:
The output folder for files generated for debugging purpose
when in debug mode. If not specified, it is ${TempPath}/docfx

options.name: --disableGitFeatures
options.description:
Disable fetching Git related information for articles. By
default it is enabled and may have side effect on performance when the repo is
large.

options.name: --dryRun
options.description:
If set to true, template will not be actually applied to
the documents. This option is always used with --exportRawModel or
--exportViewModel is set so that only raw model files or view model files are
generated.

options.name: --errorHandling
options.description:
Specify how to handle pdf pages that fail to load: abort,
ignore or skip(default abort), it is the same input as wkhtmltopdf
--load-error-handling options

options.name: --excludeDefaultToc
options.description:
Specify whether or not to exclude a table of contents. By
default the value is false

options.name: --excludedTocs
options.description: Specify the toc files to be excluded

options.name: --exportRawModel
options.description:
If set to true, data model to run template script will be
extracted in .raw.model.json extension

options.name: --exportViewModel
options.description:
If set to true, data model to apply template will be
extracted in .view.model.json extension

options.name: --filePath
options.description:
The path and file name of a wkhtmltopdf.exe compatible
executable. This path may be relative to the current working directory. If not
specified, wkhtmltopdf.exe will be searched in paths specified in the PATH
environment variable.

options.name: --generatesAppendices
options.description:
Specify whether or not to generate appendices for
not-in-TOC articles

options.name: --generatesExternalLink
options.description:
Specify whether or not to generate external links for
PDF

options.name: --host
options.description:
Specify the hostname to link not-in-TOC
articles

options.name: --hostname
options.description:
Specify the hostname of the hosted website (e.g.,
'localhost' or '*')

options.name: --keepFileLink
options.description:
If set to true, docfx does not dereference (aka. copy) file
to the output folder, instead, it saves a link_to_path property inside
mainfiest.json to indicate the physical location of that file.

options.name: --keepRawFiles
options.description:
Specify whether or not to keep the intermediate html files
that used to generate the PDF file. It it usually used in debug purpose. By
default the value is false

options.name: --locale
options.description: Specify the locale of the pdf file

options.name: --log
options.description: Specify the file name to save processing log

options.name: --logLevel
options.description:
Specify to which log level will be logged. By default log
level >= Info will be logged. The acceptable value could be Verbose, Info,
Warning, Error.

options.name: --markdownEngineProperties
options.description:
Set the parameters for markdown engine, value should be a
JSON string.

options.name: --maxParallelism
options.description: Set the max parallelism, 0 is auto.

options.name: --name
options.description: Specify the name of the generated pdf

options.name: --noStdin
options.description: Do not use stdin when wkhtmltopdf is executed

options.name: --output
options.description: Specify the output base directory

options.name: --port
options.description: Specify the port of the hosted website

options.name: --postProcessors
options.description: Set the order of post processors in plugins

options.name: --rawModelOutputFolder
options.description:
Specify the output folder for the raw model. If not set,
the raw model will be generated to the same folder as the output
documentation

options.name: --rawOutputFolder
options.description:
Specify the output folder for the raw files, if not
specified, raw files will by default be saved to _raw subfolder under output
folder if keepRawFiles is set to true.

options.name: --repositoryRoot
options.description: Specify the GIT repository root folder.

options.name: --all
options.description:

exported.

templates
